return(function(U,d,L,Z,O,l,J,j,r,v,V,C,e,W,X,h,A,E,g,c,S,Y,D,x)r,h,W,C,e,S,j,x,E,V,c,g,Y,v,X,D,A=function(U,P)local d=S(P)local L=function(L)return x(U,{L},P,d)end return L end,function(U,P)local d=S(P)local L=function()return x(U,{},P,d)end return L end,{},function(U,P)local d=S(P)local L=function(L,Z)return x(U,{L,Z},P,d)end return L end,{},function(U)for P=-101137-(-101138),#U,500451-500450
